variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the correct direct-cost concept. For an insurer, 'Insurance service expenses' is the closest analogue to COGS/cost of sales, but because this was selected outside candidates and insurer presentation differs from industrial COGS, manual review is warranted. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Insurance service expenses

candidates.why: Explicit overhead/administrative expense row; semantically strong SG&A component.

candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

variables.notes: 'Administration expenses' is the clearest SG&A row but appears only in earlier period(s). To cover later years, added 'Other costs' as the closest broader overhead bucket outside the candidate list. However, 'Other costs' may include amortization and non-recurring items based on nearby detail rows, so this requires manual review. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other costs
